title: Shattered Souls
description: Souls-Like RPG Modpack based on the Souls games and Elden Ring.
body:
![Shattered Souls](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c30455844c2bb80663011e247baa182fad88861.png)

---

**Just a quick update on the 'story' line update. As most people would guess no I have not been working on it. I've been focusing on school and family and this pack just isn't my top priority. I can promise the update will release before GTA 6 though.**

Shattered Souls is a "Souls-like" Minecraft RPG Modpack that strives to be refreshing and fun for players. 
In the future if the pack gets enough downloads i'll probably make a server or map for the pack with actual quests and a story but right now it's just this :).

---
